html:
“A large 12 slots container that also slows the wearer by 20% when worn.”

-

The Piggyback is a type of Backpack which requires 4 Pig Skins, 6 Silk, and 2 Ropes to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It is a larger Backpack which has 12 Inventory slots but reduces walking speed by 10% while equipped. It has 4 more slots than a Backpack, but 2 less than the Krampus Sack. It cannot be placed in the inventory or in Chests. Unlike the regular Backpack, it is fireproof.

The Piggyback and items inside are waterproof, but it does not protect the player from getting wet.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Piggy Backpack skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020 in the Survivalist's Belongings Chest. Its appearance resembles a Pigman and its buckle references the Golden Belts introduced in the Year of the Pig King.
  • The Woven - Elegant Elephant Pack skin was introduced with the Wolfgang Refresh in December 2021 through the Musclebound Chest. Its appearance references the circus elephant Wolfgang used to pretend to lift in his animated short.
Woven - Elegant
Musclebound Collection
Elephant Pack
It really puts the "pack" in pachyderm!
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Carrat Collection
Piggy Backpack
This little piggy will carry your things all the way home.
See ingame

Tips

  • This is a good replacement for the Backpack until you get the Krampus Sack, though it should be unequipped during combat.
  • The speed reduction is completely ignored when riding a Beefalo, although one should hesitate to make a piggyback if they have a Beefalo with low domestication.
    • This also makes the piggyback much better for characters that heavily utilize Beefalos, such as Wendy and Maxwell.
  • The speed penalty can be mitigated with the Walking Cane.
  • Wolfgang, when in Mighty form, ignores the item's speed penalty. This in conjunction with the Leg Day perk from his Skill Tree makes the Piggyback a practical direct upgrade from the Backpack.
  • Woodie also doesn't suffer from the Piggyback's speed penalty, but only when he is transformed in one of his Wereforms. This makes the Piggyback very useful to equip for extra storage if one is making good use of his Wereforms, and is especially useful when visiting far away places such as the Lunar Island, Moon Quay, or the Ruins.

Trivia

  • The Piggyback was added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
  • The Piggyback's name is a pun, on both the fact it is a backpack made from a pig's skin and on the action of giving a piggyback.

“This little piggy's gone... "home".”
–Wilson
“It's a backpack made out of butts!”
–Willow
“Smelly bag!”
–Wolfgang
“They are more useful in death.”
–Wendy
“UPGRADED STORAGE MODULE V2.0”
–WX-78
“A face only necessity could love.”
–Wickerbottom
“Used all the parts of the pig.”
–Woodie
“Oh, that's just demeaning.”
–Maxwell
“The pig died with hönör, then gave tö me this pack.”
–Wigfrid
“It holds so much stuff!”
–Webber
“Cochon bag!”
–Warly
“Carries stuff”
–Wormwood
“Makes everything smell like pig.”
–Winona
“So I keep my things within this little bag made of pig skin.”
–Wortox
“Made bag from nasty pigskin.”
–Wurt
“This is giving me inspiration for a new campfire story...”
–Walter
“Do I really want to lug this thing around?”
–Wanda

It is a larger Backpack which has 12 Inventory slots but reduces walking speed by 10% while equipped. It has 4 more slots than a Backpack, but 2 less than the Krampus Sack. It cannot be placed in the inventory or in Chests. Unlike the regular Backpack, it is fireproof.
The Piggyback and items inside are waterproof, but it does not protect the player from getting wet.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Woven - Elegant Piggy Backpack skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020 in the Survivalist's Belongings Chest. Its appearance resembles a Pigman and its buckle references the Golden Belts introduced in the Year of the Pig King.
The Woven - Elegant Elephant Pack skin was introduced with the Wolfgang Refresh in December 2021 through the Musclebound Chest. Its appearance references the circus elephant Wolfgang used to pretend to lift in his animated short.

This is a good replacement for the Backpack until you get the Krampus Sack, though it should be unequipped during combat.
The speed reduction is completely ignored when riding a Beefalo, although one should hesitate to make a piggyback if they have a Beefalo with low domestication.
This also makes the piggyback much better for characters that heavily utilize Beefalos, such as Wendy and Maxwell.
The speed penalty can be mitigated with the Walking Cane.
Wolfgang, when in Mighty form, ignores the item's speed penalty. This in conjunction with the Leg Day perk from his Skill Tree makes the Piggyback a practical direct upgrade from the Backpack.
Woodie also doesn't suffer from the Piggyback's speed penalty, but only when he is transformed in one of his Wereforms. This makes the Piggyback very useful to equip for extra storage if one is making good use of his Wereforms, and is especially useful when visiting far away places such as the Lunar Island, Moon Quay, or the Ruins.

The Piggyback was added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
The Piggyback's name is a pun, on both the fact it is a backpack made from a pig's skin and on the action of giving a piggyback.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cõng là một loại Ba lô yêu cầu 4 Da Lợn, 6 Tơ và 2 Dây thừng để chế tạo và Máy Luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Đó là một Ba lô lớn hơn có 12 ô chứa đồ nhưng giảm 10% tốc độ đi bộ khi được trang bị. Nó có nhiều hơn 4 ô so với Ba lô nhưng ít hơn 2 ô so với Túi Krampus. Nó không thể được đặt trong kho hoặc trong Rương. Không giống như Ba lô thông thường, nó có khả năng chống cháy.

It cannot be placed in the inventory or in Chests. Unlike the regular [[Backpack]], it is fireproof. The Piggyback and items inside are [[Wetness|waterproof]], but it does not protect the player from getting wet. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Backpacks|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Piggy Backpack''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Carrat]] event in 2020 in the ''Survivalist's Belongings Chest.'' Its appearance resembles a Pigman and its buckle references the [[Year of the Pig King|Golden Belts]] introduced in the Year of the Pig King. * The '''Woven - Elegant Elephant Pack''' skin was introduced with the Wolfgang Refresh in December 2021 through the ''Musclebound Chest''. Its appearance references the circus elephant Wolfgang used to pretend to lift in his [[Animated Shorts and Trailers#The_Incredible_Strongman|animated short]].

This makes the Piggyback very useful to equip for extra storage if one is making good use of his Wereforms, and is especially useful when visiting far away places such as the [[Lunar Island]], [[Moon Quay]], or the [[Ruins]]. == {{pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Piggyback was added in the ''[[Version History#March 26, 2013 - Doorway to Adventure|Doorway to Adventure]]'' update. * The Piggyback's name is a pun, on both the fact it is a backpack made from a pig's skin and on the action of giving a piggyback. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Piggyback= Piggyback Dropped.png|Dropped Piggyback Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Elephant Pack= Elephant Pack Dropped.png|Dropped Elephant Pack Equipped.png|Equipped |-| Piggy Backpack= Piggy Backpack Dropped.png|Dropped Piggy Backpack Equipped.png|Equipped =={{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Doorway to Adventure.jpg|Piggyback as seen in the poster for the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History#March 26, 2013 - Doorway to Adventure|Doorway to Adventure]]'' update.
